jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NHB - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
